title: Testing, Debugging, and Quality Evidence · Stakeholder Software Mission
summary: A community financial coaching program. Participants need a private local tracker with imports, summaries, tests, and understandable failures. Planned artifact: Deliver Tested Household Expense Tracker with acceptance evidence, rubric defense, reflection, and a changed-constraint extension. Learners progress through prediction, explicit theory, changed-case practice, causal debugging, and evidence defense.
objectives: Build a command-line interface with argparse subcommands, validated options, useful help, standard streams, and exit codes.
Use date, time, datetime, timedelta, and timezone-aware values without comparing naive and aware timestamps.
Test one observable behavior with arrange-act-assert structure, deterministic data, and meaningful failure output.
Preserve previously learned constraints and attach observable changed-case evidence.
